profiles.name: Rupesh Sanghavi
profiles.title: YPO Global One (G1) Chapter Member
profiles.about: Rupesh Sanghavi is an entrepreneur who turned a small start into something big. What began with reselling a single used book sparked a journey that led to building Ergode Inc., an eCommerce company now serving customers in over 150 countries. Under his leadership, the company has grown to offer more than 3 million products and built strong partnerships with over 2,500 vendors. His work has earned recognition over the years, including back-to-back nominations as a finalist for the EY Entrepreneur of the Year award. Ergode also ranks among the top sellers on platforms like Amazon, Walmart, and Target. But for Rupesh, success is not just about business. He’s a proud husband and father of three boys. He finds joy in reading and traveling, both of which continue to shape how he thinks as a leader. His writing, shared through his blog Cloverbites, often reflects these personal lessons and experiences. He believes in paying it forward. Whether it's guiding university students or supporting early-stage founders, Rupesh enjoys mentoring others and helping them navigate the path of entrepreneurship. His story is a reminder that big things often begin with small steps, and that resilience, clarity, and a love for learning can go a long way. Feel free to connect with Rupesh here on LinkedIn to exchange ideas, share stories, or explore meaningful collaboration.

profiles.name: Gia Hayes
profiles.title: Tech Co-Founder
profiles.about: From Athlete🏀 to Engineer👩🏾‍💻: Crafting Solutions, Building Value, and Inspiring Growth ✨ I’m a software engineer, entrepreneur, and lifelong learner dedicated to solving problems, creating value, and sharing insights. My journey spans from excelling as a student-athlete at Bucknell University - where I earned a B.S. in Computer Science & Engineering with a Mathematics minor - to developing impactful mobile (Android) solutions at Microsoft for Teams that enhance the lives of millions of consumers every day. But that’s just one part of the story. Outside of work, I’m deeply committed to empowering others and exploring diverse passions: • Founder of GiaWia’s Math Hub: Helping students unlock their potential in mathematics and computer science through personalized tutoring. • Tech Co-Founder at iEatz Healthy: Driving innovation at an app startup designed to help people create nutritious meals with what’s already in their kitchens. • Real Estate Investor: Strategically building wealth and financial freedom. • Model at Sculp Agency: Bringing unique creativity and confidence into the world. I believe success is a blend of curiosity, action, and impact. Whether it’s developing world-class software, scaling multiple streams of income, or sharing actionable insights, I’m passionate about making a difference. Follow me for authentic takes on tech, entrepreneurship, personal growth, and the lessons I’ve learned while juggling five income streams, a love for sports, and a global mindset. Let’s connect, grow, and inspire each other to reach new heights.

profiles.name: Maksym Zhakun

profiles.about: With over 8 years of experience in software engineering for cryptocurrency platforms, I am a blockchain and web expert who can design, develop, and deploy scalable and secure microservices and front-end applications. I have a strong background in engineering and problem-solving, as I hold a bachelor's degree in electromechanical and a higher school diploma with honor in mathematical. Currently, I work as a software engineer at Coinbase, where I leverage my core competencies in Go, Python, Typescript, GraphQL, REST, gRPC, Stripe, Nuxt/Vue, Typescript, AWS, and GitLab to create innovative and user-friendly solutions for the crypto industry. Previously I architected and implemented APIs, payment functionality, testing frameworks, UI, and CI/CD pipelines for Quantify Crypto and EVM Finance, as well as contributed to the cybersecurity platform SiteProtect at Neustar. My mission is to use my expertise in blockchain and web development to empower people and businesses to access the benefits of the decentralized economy.

profiles.name: Alan Macdonald
profiles.title: Engineer in Residence
profiles.about: I'm passionate about harnessing the power of artificial intelligence, technology, and data to drive business growth and operational excellence. With over 25 years of experience at the intersection of marketing, technology, and AI integration, I've dedicated my career to transforming businesses and inspiring innovation. As Chief Operating Officer and Chief AI Officer, I thrive on developing data-driven strategies that enhance customer experiences and optimize digital transformations. My role allows me to merge cutting-edge AI solutions with strategic planning to deliver impactful results. Currently, I'm pursuing a Doctorate in Business Administration (DBA), focusing my research on integrating AI into business processes to improve efficiency and competitiveness. As part of my research, I lead the strategic development of an innovative proof-of-concept application that leverages advanced AI technologies, including emotion detection and classification systems. To support this, I incorporate tools like Hume AI (https://www.hume.ai/), enhancing the system's ability to monitor student engagement in real-time (with their expressed consent, of course). Embedded within a Learning Management System (LMS), this adaptive intelligence system identifies signs of student disengagement and intervenes by offering personalized learning content powered by Large Language Models (LLMs). The tailored content—such as interactive polls, quizzes, or relevant use-cases—effectively re-engages students. The system empowers learners to interact with the generative AI, request alternative explanations, or confirm their understanding, thereby creating smarter, personalized learning experiences. Beyond my professional endeavours, I'm committed to giving back and shaping future leaders. Serving as an Engineer in Residence and University Ambassador at the University of Salford, I mentor students and share insights from my journey in AI and business. I believe in inspiring the next generation to think boldly and act innovatively. I'm a lifelong learner and a proponent of continuous improvement, always seeking new challenges and opportunities to grow. Let's connect to explore how we can collaborate to drive innovation and achieve extraordinary results together.

profiles.name: Rishi Raj
profiles.title: Software Engineer
profiles.about: As a Solutions Architect specializing in Azure Cloud, I drive end-to-end cloud transformation modernizing legacy systems, building scalable cloud-native solutions, and aligning architecture with business outcomes like uptime, cost-efficiency, and compliance. Cloud Architecture: * Championed the Azure Well-Architected Framework, creating reusable infrastructure patterns that improved app performance by 40% for wealth management workloads migrating to the cloud. * Led re-architecture of enterprise API platforms, modernizing legacy Layer 7 gateways and API portals while decommissioning on-prem systems. * Developed robust cloud-native patterns using Azure API Management, App Gateway, OAuth, and JWT to enable secure third-party integrations. * Integrated Azure OpenAI to build smart DevOps prompts—automating cloud provisioning and removing manual toil from workflows. DevOps Delivery: * Designed and deployed 10+ microservices on Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) with HPA, Istio service mesh, RBAC, and network policies—delivering high availability, zero-downtime rollouts via Helm and GitHub CI/CD. * Authored 10+ DevSecOps pipelines with Terraform, GitHub Actions, and infrastructure scanning tools like Wiz, Microsoft Defender, and Sentinel—reducing monthly infra threat incidents by 98%. * Cut IaC delivery time by 40% using GitHub Copilot to generate optimized Terraform templates. * Embedded shift-left security with Checkmarx, CxOne, InsightAppSec, and integrated DAST, SAST, IAST, and SCA into pipeline workflows. 📈 Driving Real Impact: * Created 5+ hybrid cloud architecture patterns (on-prem + Azure) with ExpressRoute, App Gateway, and WAF for enterprise-scale app teams. * Built intelligent observability into mission-critical apps using Azure Monitor, App Insights, Dynatrace, and OpenTelemetry—hitting 99.995% uptime. * Spearheaded a client help center redesign using React and Spring Boot—boosted CSAT by 25% and dropped call volume by 70%. I thrive at the intersection of cloud engineering, platform engineering, developer productivity, and enterprise strategy. Let's connect and talk!
